ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "mpg" REAL /* Miles per gallon */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders */,
  "displacement" INTEGER /* Displacement in cubic inches */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight in pounds */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Acceleration from 0-60 mph */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Model year */,
  "origin" INTEGER /* Origin of the vehicle (e.g., USA, Europe, Japan) */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the vehicle type */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle manufacturer */,
  "model" TEXT /* Specific model of the vehicle */,
  "production_start_year" INTEGER /* Year when the model started production */,
  "production_end_year" INTEGER /* Year when the model ended production */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used (e.g., gasoline, diesel, electric) */,
  "transmission" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., automatic, manual) */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Drive type (e.g., front-wheel drive, rear-wheel drive, all-wheel drive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES vehicle_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_origin FOREIGN KEY ("origin") REFERENCES origins ("origin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "origins" (
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each origin */,
  "origin_name" TEXT /* Name of the origin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("origin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., airbags, ABS) */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the feature (e.g., yes, no) */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the feature */,
  "feature_category" TEXT /* Category of the feature (e.g., safety, comfort, performance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_features_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "safety_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the rating belongs to */,
  "rating" REAL /* Safety rating (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., NHTSA, IIHS) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "rating_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used for the rating (e.g., crash test, rollover resistance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_safety_ratings_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Origin of the vehicle (e.g., USA, Europe, Japan)
